text: What an incredible achievement — finishing your first marathon is something truly special, and you should be so proud of yourself. Twenty-six point two miles is no small thing, and crossing that finish line represents not just the race itself but all the early mornings, long training runs, sore legs, and moments of doubt you pushed through to get there. The mental toughness it takes to keep going when your body is telling you to stop is something most people never find out they have — and now you know you have it. Welcome to a club that not everyone has the courage to join. Rest up, take care of yourself, and enjoy this moment. You earned every bit of it.
